entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary crop affected by peanut bud necrosis disease.

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease of groundnut caused by PBNV and transmitted by Thrips palmi.

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: The virus that causes peanut bud necrosis disease.

entities.name: THRIPS PALMI
entities.description: The insect vector that transmits peanut bud necrosis virus.

entities.name: SOUTH AND SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: The geographical region where peanut bud necrosis disease is an important issue.

entities.name: FIELD RESISTANCE
entities.description: Low disease incidence observed under field conditions.

entities.name: ARACHIS SPECIES
entities.description: Wild species of groundnut that show resistance to the disease.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO THRIPS
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist infestation or transmission by Thrips palmi.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO PBNV
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist infection by the peanut bud necrosis virus.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: The breeding strategy used to improve resistance levels.

entities.name: ICGV 86031
entities.description: A high-yielding groundnut variety showing resistance to PBNV.

entities.name: JCGV 86388
entities.description: A high-yielding groundnut variety showing resistance to PBNV.

entities.name: MECHANICAL SAP-INOCULATION
entities.description: A technique used to test resistance to PBNV by introducing the virus manually.
